Pick the screens for the landing page

Every option is a real capture from the running app — five different mantras, three languages, light and dark. The landing page centerpiece holds 2–3 phones comfortably (more starts to crowd); we can also use extras further down the page if you want a second visual section.

Reply with the numbers, e.g. "3, 6 and 12" — first number = front phone.

Unlock overlays — the money shot (live over YouTube)
